Control
=================================

The ``control.py`` module contains the functions for performing inference of policies (sequences of control states) in POMDP generative models,
according to active inference.

.. admonition:: Docxology

   Control / policy tests and examples: ``docxology/docs/validation_matrix.md`` (JAX agent and control). Gallery: ``examples/advanced/complex_action_dependency.ipynb``, ``examples/envs/knapsack_demo.ipynb``.

.. automodule:: pymdp.control
    :members:
